data.content: Implementation review: work/foolery-df3a only updates 3 of 8 views (relationship-picker, wave-planner, waves/route). The following views still use raw shortId and do NOT show aliases: beat-columns.tsx, beat-detail-lightbox.tsx, dep-tree.tsx, retakes-view.tsx, cascade-close-dialog.tsx. A separate feat/df3a-alias-in-views branch addressed some of these, but those changes were not incorporated into the work branch. The beat-display.ts utility, types, and tests that ARE present are well-structured. Next implementer should merge the feat branch changes or re-apply alias support to the remaining 5 views using the displayBeatLabel() utility.
